label: Instruction Pipeline
description: Signal, instruction, and fill columns with real-time updates, status filters, and expandable detail rows.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: [instructions]. 0.4 PASS — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A (mock) — context is synchronous mock; LiveFeedWidget base already supports isLoading prop but context does not expose it; wire isLoading from context when real API is introduced. 0.7 PASS — InstructionPipelineRows renders 'No instructions match the current filters' when filteredInstructions.length === 0. 0.8 N/A (mock) — context is synchronous; LiveFeedWidget base already supports error+onRetry props but context does not expose error; wire error from context when real API is introduced. 0.9 PASS — no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook; no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2 PASS — context calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3 PASS — organizationIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds which filters allInstructions. 1.4 PASS — clientIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds cascade via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.5 PASS — strategyIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds filter directly. 1.6 PASS — when scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 the filter is skipped so all instructions are returned. 1.7 PASS — INSTRUCTION_STRATEGY_TYPES in lib/config/services/instructions.config; TRADING_OPERATION_TYPES in lib/config/services/trading.config.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error; LiveFeedWidget base already supports both props but they are not wired — add when real API replaces mock data
findings: 0.6/0.8 ready but unwired: LiveFeedWidget accepts isLoading and error/onRetry props; InstructionsPipelineTableWidget should pass these from context once InstructionsDataProvider exposes them
